case_title: CHINEDU L. CHUKU et al VS. CHASE HOME FINANCE LLC et al

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER FILED BY DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., AS SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO CHASE HOME FINANCE, LLC (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS CHASE HOME FINANCE LLC AND JPMORGAN CHASE, N.A.)

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY ON JULY 2, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 501. THE MOVING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE COMPLAINT PER LOCAL RULE 2.6C WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE NO LATER THAN JUNE 22, 2012 AT 4:00 PM TO DEPARTMENT 501. JUDGE: JAMES MCBRIDE; COURT REPORTER: TEANNA L. WARD, CSR NO. 119118

NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 3, 2012, ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE ELLEN CHAITIN, NOT REPORTED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 19, 2012 ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE ELLEN CHAITIN, NOT REPORTED

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION, SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND SEE NYMARK; SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION, OVERRULE, MOVING PARTY PROVIDES NO BINDING AUTHORITY THAT DEFENDANTS NOT SUBJECT TO ACT; THIRD THROUGH SEVENTH CAUSES OF ACTION, OVERRULE. PULVER NOT APPLICABLE; EIGHTH CAUSE OF ACTION, OVERRULE. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES SUFFICIENT FACTS TO OVER COME STATUE OF LIMITATIONS; NINTH CAUSE OF ACTION, SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE BREACHED CONTRACT PROVISION AND IF SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION MUST SO ALLEGE; TENTH CAUSE OF ACTION OVERRULE; ELEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION, SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT; TWELFTH CAUSE OF ACTION, OVERRULE, SUFFICIENTLY PLEAD; THIRTEENTH CAUSE OF ACTION OVERRULE; FOURTEENTH CAUSE OF ACTION, SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND; AND FIFTEENTH CAUSE OF ACTION, SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE FACTS SHOWING "ACCOUNTS ARE SO COMPLICATED THAT ACTION AT LAW IMPRACTICABLE." PLAINTIFF PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follow: DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
First cause of action, sustain with leave to amend see Nymark; Second cause of action, overrule, moving party provides no binding authority that defendants not subject to ACT; Third through seventh causes of action, overrule. Pulver not applicable; Eighth cause of action, overrule. Plaintiff alleges sufficient facts to over come Statue of Limitations; Ninth cause of action, sustain with leave to amend to allege breached contract provision and if second cause of action must so allege; Tenth cause of action overrule; Eleventh cause of action, sustain with leave to amend to allege outrageous conduct; Twelfth cause of action, overrule, sufficiently plead; Thirteenth cause of action overrule; Fourteenth cause of action, sustain without leave to amend; and Fifteenth cause of action, sustain with leave to amend to allege facts showing "accounts are so complicated that action at law impracticable." Plaintiff prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/REQ)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-03-2012 Continued To Jul-19-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to July 19, 2012 on Court's own motion. Judge Ellen Chaitin, Not Reported (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-02-2012 Continued To Jul-03-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to July 3, 2012, on court's own motion. Judge Ellen Chaitin, Not Reported (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-18-2012 Continued To Jul-02-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - To be heard by Judge Quidachay on July 2, 2012 at 9:30 am in Department 501. The moving party shall provide a courtesy copy of the Complaint per Local Rule 2.6C with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date no later than June 22, 2012 at 4:00 pm to Department 501. Judge: James Mcbride; Court Reporter: Teanna L. Ward, CSR No. 119118 = (302/JJM)
